title: Converting a Dashboard into a template
excerpt: I try to convert my Dashboard into a template, but I can’t find the possibility to do so. Am I looking in the wrong direction?

posts.author: nickheurter (Nick Heurter)
posts.cookedHtml: I try to convert my Dashboard into a template, but I can’t find the possibility to do so. Am I looking in the wrong direction?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nick,

It is not currently possible to save a dashboard as a template I am afraid! This is a great idea however and I encourage you to submit this as a feature request so our community can add their vote
